source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/2. 보완(준비본)/보완제출_예정)/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료 (Rev)/04 성능에 관한 자료 (Rev)/2. 사이버보안/PDF/성능시험성적서/1. [G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-BLU).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance Test Report A-PTR-BLU Rev. 3 confirms performance settings and PASS results for H&abyz medical image acquisition device G series models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation review by documenting performance and safety-related test evidence for the listed Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models.
keyPoints: Manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. and product name is 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector.
The report covers G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
Issue date is 2026.04.14 and Rev. No. 3 states revision due to product component upgrades.

Tests include CsI deposition thickness, sensor type, scintillator, pixel pitch, effective pixel number, effective pixel area, sensitivity, MTF, DQE, limited resolution, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, and trigger mode.
All summarized test items are marked PASS.

evidence.claim: Document number is A-PTR-BLU.
evidence.evidenceText: Doc No. A-PTR-BLU

evidence.claim: The report is Rev. No. 3.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. No. 3

evidence.claim: The issue date is 2026.04.14.
evidence.evidenceText: Issue date 2026.04.14

evidence.claim: Rev. 3 was issued due to product component upgrades.
evidence.evidenceText: 3 2026.04.14 Revision due to product component upgrades

evidence.claim: The report is for performance confirmation of medical image acquisition devices G1417CW and seven other models.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7 종)의 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: Test items were performed from 2025.11.14 to 2025.11.17.
CsI deposition thickness test passed for 300μm and 500μm types.
evidence.evidenceText: 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족; 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type requirements are PIN-TFT or Flexible PIN-TFT using a-Si and IGZO, and the test result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type (센서 타입 확인) PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) ... Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator confirmation used CsI specification evidence and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch criterion is 140μm ± 10% and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% ... PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criteria are 2500 x 3052 pixels or higher, 3040 x 3040 pixels or higher, and 3072 x 3072 pixels or higher depending on model group, with PASS results.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 2500 x 3052 pixels 이상 ... 3040 x 3040 pixels 이상 ... 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criteria are 350 x 427.3mm ± 10%, 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10%, and 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% depending on model group.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 350 x 427.3mm ± 10% 이내 ... 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10% 이내 ... 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% 이내

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70kV, 4~64mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensitivity ... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 4 ~ 64mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing used an MTF Phantom image with calibration and Final Test program, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. ... PASS

evidence.claim: DQE testing used bright image acquisition with calibration and Final Test program, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. ... PASS

evidence.claim: Limited resolution criterion is Max 3.57 lp/mm and the calculated result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Limited resolution Max 3.57 lp/mm 1 / Pixel pitch * 2 PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing confirmed normal operation at 40kvp and 150kvp for all listed models.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion uses 16bit ROIC data and converts to 14bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: Wireless standard criterion is IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and passed by Wifi module specification review.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: IP range criterion is IP68 according to IEC 60529 and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: IP Range IP68 IEC 60529에 따른다 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion is 1Giga-bit Ethernet and passed by specification review.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Trigger mode testing confirmed Line trigger mode and Auto trigger mode normal operation with PASS results.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states no abnormality in performance setting values for medical image acquisition device model HnX-R1, G series.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, G series)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly stated in the document body; source metadata/path indicate domestic/MFDS context but the report text only lists attachments such as KGMP 적합인정서.
Product name contains OCR or source spelling 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector'; not normalized to 'Flat' to preserve source traceability.
Attachment pages 31-61 mostly contain headings without extracted attachment body text, so attachment details are not available from the provided source text.
